inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Value (pass-through)
inputs.description: Passed through to the output unchanged. Use {{input}} in the Message to embed this value in the notification.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Title Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured notification title at runtime.

inputs.name: message
inputs.label: Message Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured message at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Pass-through
outputs.description: The input value, passed unchanged so this node can be chained.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the notification could not be sent.

properties.label: Message
properties.placeholder: Use {{input}} to embed the wired-in value.
